title: eriocaulon mutatum
intro: Eriocaulon mutatum, also known as the New Zealand pipe moss or pipewort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Eriocaulaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eriocaulon mutatum include reducing inflammation, treating wounds and skin conditions, and supporting the immune system. Eriocaulon mutatum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
